description:
DevTools Pro puts 12 essential web development tools in one extension — no juggling multiple tools, no switching contexts.

FREE TOOLS (use without limits, forever):
- CSS Inspector — View computed styles for any element, organized by category. See the actual CSS the browser is applying, not just what's in your stylesheet.
- Color Picker — Pick any color on the page and copy it as hex, RGB, or HSL. See WCAG contrast ratios instantly.
- Font Detector — Identify fonts, weights, sizes, and line heights on any element. Preview text in the detected font.
- Spacing Visualizer — See margins, padding, and borders with a visual box model diagram. No more guessing at spacing values.
- Element Info — Get tag name, classes, dimensions, position, and a unique CSS selector for any element.
- Page Meta — View all meta tags at a glance: Open Graph, Twitter cards, viewport, and SEO tags organized by category.

PRO TOOLS ($60 one-time, 7-day free trial):
- Screenshot Capture — Take screenshots of the visible viewport, saved as PNG.
- Accessibility Checker — Audit heading structure, landmark regions, ARIA roles, alt text, and form labels. Issues flagged by severity.
- CSS Variables — Extract every CSS custom property from the page. Variables grouped by scope with color swatches for color values.
- Rulers & Measurement — Hover to see element dimensions and distances to parent and sibling elements.
- Grid & Flexbox Overlay — Visualize grid and flexbox layouts. See container properties and child item details.
- Page Assets — List all images, scripts, stylesheets, and fonts loaded on the page.

WHY DEVTOOLS PRO?
- One extension instead of six. Install once, get everything.
- Zero tracking. Zero ads. No account required.
- Works on any website. Activates only when you click a tool.
- Dark and light themes, compact mode.
- Free tools are genuinely free — not a crippled trial.

Built by Brightbar (brightbar.dev).
single_purpose: Inspect and debug web page elements: view computed CSS properties, detect fonts, pick colors with format conversion, measure spacing and box model, view element info and selectors, and read page meta tags. Pro tier adds screenshot capture, accessibility checking, CSS variables extraction, rulers, grid overlay visualization, and page asset listing.

permission_justifications.activeTab: Used to access the current page's DOM when the user activates an inspection tool. The extension reads computed styles, element attributes, and meta tags from the active tab only when the user explicitly clicks a tool button.
permission_justifications.storage: Used to save user preferences (theme, compact mode) and Pro license status locally on the user's device. No data is transmitted externally.
permission_justifications.scripting: Used to inject the inspector overlay and floating info panel into the active tab when the user activates an inspection tool. The content script reads element properties on hover and displays them in a panel. Injection only occurs on user action.
permission_justifications.host_permissions: Required because the content script must be injectable on any website the developer is inspecting. The extension only activates when the user explicitly clicks a tool — it does not run automatically or in the background on any page.
